name: Suspicious PsExec Activity
notes:
This rule detects suspicious PsExec activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Impacket PsExec Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of Impacket's psexec.py.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5002297) A Network Share Object Was Checked To See Whether Client Can Be Granted Desired Access

when the event matches "Share Full Full Name" LIKE '\\*\IPC$' AND ( ( ( LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stdin' OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stdout' OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stderr' ) AND LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") NOT LIKE 'psexesvc%' ) OR ( LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stdin' OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stdout' OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stderr' ) ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious PsExec Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5002297) A Network Share Object Was Checked To See Whether Client Can Be Granted Desired Access

AND when the event matches "Share Full Full Name" LIKE '\\*\IPC$' AND  (     (         (             LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stdin'             OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stdout'             OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE '%-stderr'         )         AND LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") NOT LIKE 'psexesvc%'     )     OR      (         LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stdin'         OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stdout'         OR LOWER("Relative Target Full Full Name") LIKE 'remcom_stderr'     ) ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects suspicious PsExec activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
